description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Fully furnished 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 42 squaremeters, at XT Phayathai building, in the popular
Ratchathewi district near BTS Phaya Thai. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

description.en: This property is a 45 SqM condo with 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom that is available for rent. It is part of the XT Phayathai project in Thanon Phaya Thai, Bangkok and was completed in Aug 2022. You can rent this condo long term for ฿22,000 per month.
